# Sim Kaur

> Sim Kaur is a Creative Director, Fashion Film Director, Music Video Director, and Photographer based in Sydney, Australia. She specialises in dance films, fashion films, and music videos, working with brands, artists, and labels.

## Key Facts

- **Name**: Sim Kaur
- **Roles**: Creative Director, Film Director, Cinematographer, Editor, Photographer
- **Location**: Sydney, NSW, Australia
- **Specialisation**: Fashion films, dance films, music videos, editorial photography
- **Website**: https://simkaur.art
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/s1mkaur/
- **Vimeo**: https://vimeo.com/user197917349

## Pages

- [Home](https://simkaur.art/): Showreel and portfolio overview
- [Direction](https://simkaur.art/direction): Film direction portfolio — fashion films, dance films, music videos
- [Photography](https://simkaur.art/photography): Fashion and editorial photography
- [Exhibitions](https://simkaur.art/exhibitions): Gallery exhibitions and video art installations
- [About](https://simkaur.art/about): Biography and background

## Direction Portfolio

- [Crossfire](https://simkaur.art/direction/crossfire): Dance fashion film, 2025. Starring Aaliyah Paea & Rome Champion. Premiered at Palace Cinemas as part of JD IN MOTION.
- [Padani for ELLE India](https://simkaur.art/direction/padani-elle-india): Fashion film, 2025. Shot in Paris for ELLE India.
- [SWAMP](https://simkaur.art/direction/swamp): Dance fashion film, 2025. Starring Amanda Va.
- [Jiggy Jaya x SFTM](https://simkaur.art/direction/jiggy-jaya-sftm): Dance fashion film, 2025. Collaboration with Song for the Mute.
- [PAM Bali](https://simkaur.art/direction/pam-bali): Fashion film, 2024. Collaboration with Perks and Mini (P.A.M) x Nick Sethi. Shot at Kuta Beach Skatepark, Indonesia.
- [Pravaah](https://simkaur.art/direction/pravaah): Experimental Bharatanatyam dance film, 2023. Shot on VHS. Exhibited at Pari (ARI) Art Gallery, 2025.
- [Paris in Sydney](https://simkaur.art/direction/paris-in-sydney): Dance film, 2024.
- [Velvet Skin](https://simkaur.art/direction/velvet-skin): Music video for Dylan Atlantis, 2024.
- [Shy Sol](https://simkaur.art/direction/shy-sol): Music video for JUPiTA, 2025.
- [In The Mood for Love](https://simkaur.art/direction/in-the-mood-for-love): Music video for Church, 2025. Black & white movement-based film.
- [Sabor Celestial](https://simkaur.art/direction/sabor-celestial): Music video for Cherry Chola, 2025. Shot across Colombia and Sydney.
- [Pages](https://simkaur.art/direction/pages): Music video for Thandi, 2024.

## Contact

- Email: simtheaquarius@gmail.com
